title: Update loading messages to reflect 4000-5000 word target

requirements.summary: Update loading state messages in ResearchTopicForm.tsx to reflect the new 4000-5000 word target length during paper generation
acceptanceCriteria: Loading indicators reference 4000-5000 word generation instead of 8000-10000 words
User-facing messages accurately reflect the expected paper length

file_operations.description: Update the loading state messages displayed during paper generation to reflect the new target length of 4000-5000 words instead of 8000-10000 words. Locate any user-facing text that mentions word counts or generation time estimates and update them to align with the shorter target length. Ensure the messages remain encouraging and informative about the AI generation process.
